name: Braised Sauerkraut for Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, halved and sliced into thin half moons
1 pound Sauerkraut, rinsed, drained (squeeze dry from jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion, garlic, butter, wine, 1/4 cup of stock, and thyme in a heavy skillet.
2. Simmer briskly for 10 minutes.
3. Uncover and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 - 7 minutes or until the onions are browned and tender.
4. Stir in the sauerkraut, bay leaf, and enough remaining stock to barely cover the contents.
5. Simmer, covered, for 30 - 40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauerkraut is tender, lightly browned, and the liquid has been absorbed.
6. Discard the bay leaf and season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. Serve mixed thoroughly into mashed potatoes.
